MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-562429 WITH CASE CGC-16-549855
Off Calendar Nov-08-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CURTIS BELTON's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-562429 WITH CASE CGC-16-549855 PURSUANT TO STIPULATION BY THE PARTIES.

Defendant's motion to consolidate is GRANTED per the parties' stipulation. CGC-17-562429 is consolidated with CGC-16-549855 for all purposes. The court designates CGC-16-549855 the lead case number and all future filings shall be in that case.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/SRB)
